title: No. 1 Businessman
subTitle: An intelligent and ambitious youngster arrives in Mumbai and becomes a mafia don, but one day, things take turn when he falls in love with a cop's daughter.

title: Sat Na Gat
subTitle: Naami, who is from a small village, is raped and killed. While some people try to fight for justice, some parties have other vested interests in the matter, putting the case in jeopardy.

title: Pachadlela
